scope: Vendor decoupling release. guard_no_test_project floor moved to caller-configured GUC pgmnemo.test_project_floor (default 0=disabled); internal ADR citations replaced with RFC-001. No data-model, recall, or ranking change.
justification: Hygiene/decoupling release — gated by CORRECTNESS (installcheck + flat-vs-delta identical + upgrade path), not recall quality. No '+Xpp' claim made or implied. remember_fact/event/relation behaviour unchanged from 0.12.0.
